title: Smoky Venezuelan Baby New Potatoes Stir-fry
description: This date-night dish features fluffy baby new potatoes, spiced with bhuna for a smoky flavor and whole30-friendly.

ingredients.name: Whole Chili Peppers (Jalepeños)
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh or use pre-cut in a bag if dried

ingredients.name: Bhuna Spices Mix
ingredients.notes: Including cumin, coriander seeds, and turmeric

instructions: Preheat your wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Clean the baby new potatoes thoroughly. Remove any damaged skin.
Wash whole chili peppers under cold water and remove seeds if desired. Set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together ginger garlic paste with 1 tbsp of oil.
Add the mixed paste to the hot wok or skillet and stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Gently add washed baby new potatoes into the wok, tossing well to coat in the seasoned oil.
Sprinkle the bhuna spices mix over the mixture. Stir quickly to combine with the potatoes and chili peppers.
Continue stirring for another 5-7 minutes until the potatoes are tender yet fluffy.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
